steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The passage begins by describing a shared trait of all baleen whales (feeding via baleen plates) and then introduces a contrast word: ‘And while no one would call the humpback whale small...’.

This contrast sets up the comparison between humpback and fin whale sizes.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice D correctly identifies that the structure describes a characteristic shared by all baleen whales (common feeding mechanism), then illustrates a difference between the two whales (size) relevant to their feeding habits.

A and C misplace the focus (contrast first vs. common trait first).

B introduces an ‘unexpected consequence,’ which is not in the passage.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
